name: Watch Cat
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>番</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>猫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>びょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ウォッチキャット
desc: If you control no monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During your End Phase, if this card was Special Summoned this turn: You can banish this card; Set 1 Continuous Spell directly from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Watch Cat" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control no monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During your End Phase, if this card was Special Summoned this turn: You can banish this card; Set 1 Continuous Spell directly from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Watch Cat" once per turn.
eff: If you control no monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During your End Phase, if this card was Special Summoned this turn: You can banish this card; Set 1 Continuous Spell directly from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Watch Cat" once per turn.

action: Activates during the turn in which it was Special Summoned
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from field for cost
